chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1975 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 06.08.2020 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for petitioners Mr. Allah Bachayo Soormo, Additional A.G Sindh *** Learned counsel for the petitioners files statement alongwith photocopies of certain documents, same is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned Additional A.G. It is stated in the statement that the purpose of filing this petition stands achieved, therefore, same may be disposed of accordingly. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of alongwith listed applications having been infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
